CREATE TABLE T1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE T2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, t1_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (t1_id) REFERENCES T1(id));
SELECT exec_score('SELECT name FROM T1 WHERE id = 1');
SELECT exec_score('SELECT * FROM T1 INNER JOIN T2 ON T1.id = T2.t1_id');
SELECT exec_score('SELECT name FROM T1 WHERE id IN (SELECT t1_id FROM T2)');
SELECT exec_score('SELECT * FROM (SELECT name FROM T1) AS subquery');
SELECT exec_score('INSERT INTO T1 (id, name) VALUES (3, ''Charlie'')');
SELECT exec_score('UPDATE T1 SET name = ''Alice Smith'' WHERE id = 1');
SELECT exec_score('DELETE FROM T1 WHERE id = 2');
SELECT exec_score('SELECT * FROM T1 WHERE name LIKE ''%Ali%''');
